prompt: Create a high-quality realistic vertical portrait photo of two 20-year-old Japanese women who look like Korean idols, wearing elegant summer yukata at a crowded Japanese summer festival. They are close friends standing shoulder-to-shoulder, smiling warmly at the camera, photographed from the knees up. Use natural Korean-style makeup, clear glowing skin, soft brown hair with airy bangs and neat low updos. The woman on the left wears a pale white yukata with light blue, lavender, and green hydrangea-like floral patterns and a deep burgundy obi; the woman on the right wears a white yukata with large red flowers, pale blue leaves, dark accents, and a black obi with a thin pink cord. Set the scene at golden-hour evening with strong warm backlight from the setting sun, orange festival lanterns, food-stall signs, and a softly blurred crowd in the background. Make the mood cheerful, refined, and friendly, as if a professional photographer captured a natural candid shot at an upscale Tokyo neighborhood festival. Use shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, warm cinematic color grading, realistic fabric texture, flattering soft light, sharp faces, high resolution, no watermark, no extra people in focus, no distorted hands or faces.
